classifieds_47.POSSIBLE REASONS FOR FAILURE:
1. The agent failed to thoroughly scan the first page of "Boats" listings for the target item, despite the default sort order being "Newly listed".
2. By navigating to the second page of results, the agent implicitly overlooked the "most recent" aspect of the objective, as items on subsequent pages are inherently less recent than those on the first page when sorted by "Newly listed".
3. The agent did not explicitly verify that the found post was the *most recent* one, only that it matched the image and was expensive.
classifieds_47.REFLECTION: When an objective requires finding the "most recent post" and a "Newly listed" sort option is available, always prioritize a thorough visual scan of the first page of results. If the item is not found on the first page, re-evaluate the search strategy to ensure the "most recent" criteria is still met, as navigating to subsequent pages might contradict this requirement.
